title: Corrective fix for B-7ca37c85-test: Test Persist runner preference on bead and honour it during dispatch
description:
Blocked reason: `RepositoryStorage.create_bead()` does not accept a `preferred_runner` argument, so pinned-runner bead creation fails with `TypeError` before the new CLI/scheduler behavior can execute.

Remaining work: Developer needs to plumb `preferred_runner` through `RepositoryStorage.create_bead()` and persist it into the constructed `Bead`. After that, rerun the preferred-runner CLI and scheduler tests that currently error before execution.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-7ca37c85-test.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
conflict_risks: Any fix must keep the lifecycle consistent across creation, retry, scheduler dispatch, and finalization cleanup so runner pins do not survive terminal states.
